mnemonics.title: S.M.A.C.K. for Shared-Memory Challenges
mnemonics.content: Synchronization (complexity), Memory bandwidth (bottleneck), Address space (global), Coherence (cache overhead), K(ost) for large systems.

mnemonics.title: D.I.S.C.O. for Distributed-Memory Challenges
mnemonics.content: Data partitioning (required), Interconnect (network dependency), Sending messages (explicit), Complexity (programming), Overhead (communication latency).
